caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold lettering, and large over-ear headphones is seated at a desk in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm and is speaking, with his facial expressions and head position shifting slightly across the sequence. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a recurring logo with five stars and the word "HUSTLE," while a blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk to his right is a black container with red and white text that says "TALK OUT". To his left sits a black equipment case. The scene remains static in terms of location and composition, focusing on the man as he speaks into the microphone.
